creator: dg@root.com
text:
>>Description:
>
>The system panics with "leaf should be empty" and locks up.

   Try rebuilding your kernel without the DIAGNOSTIC option. It looks like
this is yet another check in the DIAGNOSTIC case that might be bogus or
overly pessimistic. DIAGNOSTIC doesn't get a lot of use and the assumptions
made in some of the checks are sometimes no longer valid.

-DG

David Greenman
Core-team/Principal Architect, The FreeBSD Project
